chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D- 5161 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judges Hearing of case. 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 21522/25 2. For hearing of main case 06.11.2025 Syed Sadaqat Ali Shah, Advocate along with petitioners. Mr. Saima Imdad, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. ---------------------------- I.O. SIP Rab Nawaz of PS Setharja, District Khairpur Mirs has recorded the statement of the Petitioner No.1 Mst. Ghulam Zakia under Section 161 Cr.P.C and on the basis of her statement Section 161 Cr.PC I.O. states that he will file his report in ‘C’ class before concerned magistrate. He shall do so within 03 days of the date of this order. Instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES. JUDGE
